misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, representing Hirsala Golf, is a veteran presence whose consistent participation has marked him as a cornerstone of the Hector Trophée. As the tournament prepares for its 2026 edition, Simo will be making his eleventh appearance, a remarkable record that underscores his deep commitment to this esteemed pair competition. His journey through ten previous events has forged a competitor of significant experience and unwavering resolve.

Throughout his extensive tenure, Simo has demonstrated a particular aptitude for the pair format, leading his teams to triumph and seize the coveted Hector Trophée on three separate occasions. These victories are a testament to his collaborative strength and his capacity to perform under pressure when teamed with a partner. While the individual Victor Trophy has thus far eluded his grasp, his track record in the team event highlights his instrumental role in collective success, establishing him as a potent catalyst within the competition.

Simo's competitive spirit is palpable, often manifested in a forthright demeanor that, while occasionally punctuated by colorful language, reflects an intense desire for victory. This unyielding drive also informs his constant pursuit of refinement in his game. A notable recent adjustment came in the 2025 season with his adoption of a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter, a strategic equipment change indicating his ceaseless effort to gain a competitive edge and optimize his performance on the greens.
